items.name: Teddy Cozy Off-Shoulder Knit Sweater
items.description:
Ultra-soft knit sweater with an off-shoulder neckline and long sleeves that hide the hands, designed for maximum cozy comfort. The all-over teddy bear pattern adds a playful and adorable touch, creating a warm, cute silhouette with a soft geek-chic feel. Sweet, comfy, and irresistibly cozy — perfect for soft casual outfits.

items.name: Brown Polka Knit Off-Shoulder Sweater
items.description:
Soft knit sweater with an off-shoulder neckline and oversized sleeves, designed to subtly reveal the shoulders while keeping the hands tucked inside for a cozy, shy silhouette. The brown base with delicate polka dot pattern adds a playful geek-chic charm. Warm, cute, and effortlessly stylish — perfect for soft academic and cozy fits.
